underlying_goal: Resume and continue rigorous analysis of arXiv literature scan results, investigating influence metrics, epistemic reliability of scoring methodology, and refining the analytical framework
friction_detail: Claude initially used only Popperian falsifiability as the epistemic criterion, which the user correctly challenged as outdated and overly narrow.
brief_summary: User directed iterative deepening of an arXiv literature analysis — influence distributions, inter-rater reliability, empirical validation tracking, and epistemic framework refinement — and Claude delivered substantial analysis while the user steered corrections on epistemic philosophy.
